activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor match via explicit occurrence anywhere in invoice
Goods description: Article number and main designation match
Quantity: Exact value and unit verification
Origin: EU-origin normalization and explicit per-item identification

consignor.certificate_value:
Fortex International AB
Vallgatan 22
41116, GÖTEBORG
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Fortex International AB
Vallgatan 22
411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Fortex International AB' with address in Sweden is explicitly listed as the invoice issuer (and in company/VAT data), and the country matches. Minor variation in postal code and city formatting is acceptable per normalization rules, and company name is fully included.

Chilanzar District
Chorbok Street 6
INN: 302686363
Tashkent
Uzbekistan
consignee.invoice_value:
ODIL PARER LLC
100161, Tashkent city, Chilanzar district,
Chorbok street, 6
Tashkent,
Uzbekistan
consignee.motivation: Consignee ('Odil Parer LLC', Tashkent, Uzbekistan) is found as both CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO in the invoice, with matching address and company identifier (INN), confirming match under the main rule.

goods_description.certificate_value:
69 Reels of Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC
HS Code: 4810923000
goods_description.invoice_value:
69 Reels: Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC
Subs 125gsm & 135gsm, RW 600mm - 1050mm, PO# 506536
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC', HS Code 4810923000 and quantity 69 reels exactly match in both certificate and invoice, with additional product details in invoice constituting allowed supplementary information.

quantity.invoice_value:
65.132 MT AT USD 740.00/MT, Amount: USD 48,197.68;
Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT
quantity.motivation: Certificate states gross quantity 65.132MT; invoice lists 'Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT' and unit price for 65.132 MT. The value matches exactly, and unit is compatible (MT = metric ton).

origin.motivation: Certificate lists country of origin as 'SWEDEN / EU (Spain)'; the invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: EU (Spain)'. Given both mention EU as origin and Spain is a current EU member, origin is verified by EU- and member-state normalization.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical certificate fields, including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and country of origin, are explicitly and exactly verified as present and matching in the attached invoice. No contradictions, ambiguities, or manual review triggers identified per operative ruleset.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan entydigt verifieras i fakturan: avsändare och mottagare stämmer, produktbeskrivning och kvantitet matchar, och ursprungsland är tydligt angivet på båda dokumenten. Det finns inga motsägelser eller tveksamheter. Ärendet kan godkännas automatiskt.
